{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Noroloth’s castle
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The inside of [[Noroloth’s castle]] was ravaged by a battle against a [[Monarch]] intruder.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
